review_scope: whole-image visual review for local-only bounded RealVisXL smoke; this does not replace EC2 target-runtime proof or final portfolio certification
observations: Generated a plausible body portrait with coherent facial structure, natural asymmetry, visible skin texture, and believable eye placement.
Hair, fabric, and background are coherent for a 512x512 low-step local smoke output.
Lighting and depth of field match the bounded prompt well enough to prove local RealVisXL generation is functioning.
minor_limitations: Local smoke is intentionally low resolution and only 10 steps, so it is not a final quality bar.
Fine hair edges and one shadowed eye are slightly soft, consistent with the bounded runtime settings.
next_action: Update hydration, tracker/evidence index, and Wave65 coverage; keep this as local iteration evidence only.
